rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source-verification maintainer block on any student-facing file with practitioner citations.

Covers Ronacher (defers to lecture maintainer block), Cherny (defers to lecture maintainer block), Curran (19.2% + Tier 1/2/3 numbers named for verification, freshness re-check noted, label [practitioner analysis] present), Klaassen (all three every.to URLs listed with labels, freshness re-check present). rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Canonical presentation shape — lead-in, label with destination, blank line, fenced block.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Installed Claude Code Skills invoke by name, never by path.
Markdown shout inside fenced prompt blocks is dead weight.

Entis article April 22 2026 (within 6 months of 2026-05-03). Both standalone Klaassen pieces within 6 months per source-verification freshness re-check notes.
No round-number AI failure/success rates present. The 19.2% Curran figure is a named deployment metric (not a round-number zombie stat), flagged for source-verification before first cohort.

Lines 150–161: per-phase table present covering all forcing functions: worktree setup, Phase 1 (two entries), Phase 2, Phase 3, Phase 4, Debrief, Closing lecture. Each row names dominant failure and recovery move.
